title: tragacantha setulosa
intro: Tragacantha setulosa, also known as the setulose or hairy milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of kidney and urinary tract issues due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha setulosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting urination, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as nephritis and cystitis. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha setulosa typically involve the roots and leaves being dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
